message:
style(oneshot,sqlite): rustfmt formatting cleanup

Apply rustfmt to two files:
- oneshot.rs: break long assert_with_log! macro invocations across
  multiple lines for readability (permit abort test, closed-after-abort
  assertion)
- sqlite.rs: collapse get_or_init chain onto single line, reorder
  test imports alphabetically (Budget before Outcome)

No behavioral changes — pure formatting pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
